strategy.objective: Achieve probation-compliant housing stability using currently available programs and verified eligibility.

action_steps.action: Verify veteran status and obtain DD214 or equivalent service documentation
Confirm VA enrollment status and initiate enrollment if not active
Assess HUD-VASH eligibility based on homelessness definition and VA status
Confirm probation housing constraints and jurisdiction requirements with supervising officer
Document current income status and obtain required verification or zero-income affidavit
Evaluate currently available housing options that meet probation and program requirements

explicit_exclusions: Housing options not approved by probation
strategy.strategy_notes: This strategy intentionally limits scope to verified programs and confirmed constraints. No housing placement is assumed at this stage.
